findings.description: fan_out_results_successful_endpoints_all_fail made no assertions. It created an error closure, discarded its output with let _ = ..., and returned. successful_endpoints() and total_results() had zero test coverage despite being the primary analysis interface on FanOutResults.
findings.fix: Replaced with 4 real tests (successful_endpoints_zero_when_all_fail, successful_calls_counts_ok_including_empty, successful_endpoints_counts_only_non_empty_ok, total_results_sums_across_all_ok_arms) that construct FanOutResults directly and assert correct behavior of both methods under all relevant cases.

findings.description: clear_cache_empties cleared an already-empty cache and asserted it remained empty. This is identical to cache_starts_empty and never exercises the actual cache-clearing code path.
findings.fix: Added inject_cache_entry() test-only helper to OpenFdaClient. Rewrote test as clear_cache_empties_non_empty_cache: seeds 2 entries, asserts count=2, clears, asserts count=0.

findings.class_name: Testing Theater — Semantic Mismatch Not Tested
findings.description: successful_endpoints() was documented as 'returned at least one result' but implemented as is_ok() — counting Ok([]) responses as successes. The semantic gap was never caught because no test exercised the Ok-but-empty case.
findings.fix: Rewrote successful_endpoints() to check is_ok_and(|r| !r.results.is_empty()). Preserved the old is_ok() semantic under the new name successful_calls(). Tests now cover all three cases: all-Err, empty-Ok, and non-empty-Ok.

findings.description: CLAUDE.md stated MAX_LIMIT is 100. Code defines MAX_LIMIT as 1_000. Off by 10x.
findings.fix: Updated CLAUDE.md line 19: 'Use the MAX_LIMIT (100)' → 'Use the MAX_LIMIT (1_000)'.

findings.description: lib.rs said fan_out_search 'queries all major endpoints concurrently'. FanOutResults covers 10 of 14 documented endpoints. Four endpoints present in the endpoints/ module (/drug/drugsfda.json, /device/pma.json, /device/classification.json, /device/udi.json) are absent from FanOutResults.
findings.fix: Updated fan_out_search doc block in lib.rs to explicitly name the 10 covered endpoints and call out the 4 that are available individually but not in the fan-out.

findings.description: clippy::disallowed_types was allowed crate-wide. The justification cited 'mirrors upstream payloads' but the only HashMap usage was the internal URL-keyed response cache — unrelated to payload mirroring.
findings.fix: Replaced HashMap with BTreeMap in client.rs (deterministic, no functional change for URL-keyed cache). Removed clippy::disallowed_types from the crate-level allow list.

findings.class_name: Dead Code / Orphan — field types not re-exported
findings.description: Six public types (NdcPackaging, FdaApplicationDoc, MdrPatient, UdiDeviceSize, UdiSterilization, FoodOutcome) appear as Vec<T> field types of exported structs but were missing from the types/mod.rs re-export surface, violating the stated 'ergonomic imports' design intent.
findings.fix: Added all six types to the pub use re-exports in src/types/mod.rs.
